title: Monitor the quality of test results and data
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor the quality of test results and data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Verify accuracy of data and technical records

pcs.text: Retrieve and collate all relevant data files and technical records for the specified time interval, tests, product range or project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retrieve and collate all relevant data files and technical records for the specified time interval, tests, product range or project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve and collate all relevant data files and technical records for the specified time interval, tests, product range or project.

pcs.text: Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations.

pcs.text: Confirm that technical records contain sufficient information to provide an audit trail for the tests involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that technical records contain sufficient information to provide an audit trail for the tests involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that technical records contain sufficient information to provide an audit trail for the tests involved.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Verify accuracy of data and technical records

elements.title: Assess the quality of data and results

pcs.text: Use charts and tables to determine whether data and results are within specified limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use charts and tables to determine whether data and results are within specified limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use charts and tables to determine whether data and results are within specified limits.

pcs.text: Analyse data trends and results for blanks, duplicates and/or check samples to detect systematic uncertainties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data trends and results for blanks, duplicates and/or check samples to detect systematic uncertainties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data trends and results for blanks, duplicates and/or check samples to detect systematic uncertainties.

pcs.text: Use statistical tests and workplace procedures to check data acceptability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use statistical tests and workplace procedures to check data acceptability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use statistical tests and workplace procedures to check data acceptability.

pcs.text: Check that estimations of uncertainties are reasonable and consistent with test method, client or product specification requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that estimations of uncertainties are reasonable and consistent with test method, client or product specification requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that estimations of uncertainties are reasonable and consistent with test method, client or product specification requirements.

pcs.text: Identify results that cannot be reconciled with technical records and/or expected outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify results that cannot be reconciled with technical records and/or expected outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify results that cannot be reconciled with technical records and/or expected outcomes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess the quality of data and results

elements.title: Identify potential causes for unacceptable results

pcs.text: Review user checks and calibration performance records to confirm that equipment or instrument meets test specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review user checks and calibration performance records to confirm that equipment or instrument meets test specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review user checks and calibration performance records to confirm that equipment or instrument meets test specifications.

pcs.text: Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements.

pcs.text: Review technical records to identify human or environmental factors that could affect reliability of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review technical records to identify human or environmental factors that could affect reliability of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review technical records to identify human or environmental factors that could affect reliability of results.

pcs.text: Review records of sample collection and preparation to confirm chain of custody requirements and adherence to sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review records of sample collection and preparation to confirm chain of custody requirements and adherence to sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review records of sample collection and preparation to confirm chain of custody requirements and adherence to sampling procedures.

pcs.text: Check that any documented deviations from sampling procedures and/or test methods were technically justified and authorised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that any documented deviations from sampling procedures and/or test methods were technically justified and authorised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that any documented deviations from sampling procedures and/or test methods were technically justified and authorised.

pcs.text: Check the condition of sampling equipment and/or stored samples if available and appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the condition of sampling equipment and/or stored samples if available and appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the condition of sampling equipment and/or stored samples if available and appropriate.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify potential causes for unacceptable results

elements.title: Report findings to relevant personnel

pcs.text: Summarise the quality of test results and data in required workplace formats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Summarise the quality of test results and data in required workplace formats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Summarise the quality of test results and data in required workplace formats.

pcs.text: Record potential sources or instances of non-conforming work and assess their significance for current and previously completed work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record potential sources or instances of non-conforming work and assess their significance for current and previously completed work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record potential sources or instances of non-conforming work and assess their significance for current and previously completed work.

pcs.text: Recommend appropriate preventative and/or corrective actions to improve work activities or rectify issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend appropriate preventative and/or corrective actions to improve work activities or rectify issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend appropriate preventative and/or corrective actions to improve work activities or rectify issues.

pcs.text: Prepare reports in a format and style consistent with their intended use and workplace guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare reports in a format and style consistent with their intended use and workplace guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare reports in a format and style consistent with their intended use and workplace guidelines.
